description_long: This is a dome-shaped pendant lamp with a smooth, semi-translucent shade that appears to be made of frosted or marbled glass. The lamp is suspended from a thin, straight cord or wire, which connects to the top center of the shade. Inside the shade, two bulb sockets are visible, each holding a standard-sized bulb, arranged side by side. The glass shade has a subtle swirling pattern, giving it a decorative yet understated appearance. The overall design is minimalist and modern, suitable for urban interiors or covered outdoor spaces. The lamp's form and materials suggest it is intended to provide diffused, ambient lighting.
description: A dome-shaped pendant lamp with a frosted glass shade and two visible bulbs, suspended by a thin cord. The design is minimalist with a subtle swirling pattern on the shade.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dome-shaped frosted glass shade and two bulbs inside, with the cord centered above.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing the same dome shape and bulb arrangement, with the swirling pattern on the glass more visible.
description_view_2: Another angled view, similar to the front, highlighting the symmetry of the shade and the internal bulbs.
description_view_3: Back view, nearly identical to the front, showing the dome shade and internal bulbs through the frosted glass.
